message: 有结果了：新的 child idea 已经用手动兜底方案真正落成，而且已经有独立提交，不再依赖那个会误判 anchor 的 runtime 路径。这条新线的核心判断也更清楚了：下一步不再继续泛化地试 shortlist，而是先做 hubness-calibrated 的 teacher-anchor 检索校正，看看能不能在不重训的前提下把 16-frame 的塌缩压下去；如果这一步还不行，再回到 query-side 几何修正。

guidance_vm.summary: Milestone recorded. Continue from the current anchor and keep the next checkpoint durable.
guidance_vm.why_now: Milestones should mark meaningful progress, not end the route prematurely.
complete_when: The next substantive output is written durably.

suggested_artifact_calls.name: artifact.interact(kind='progress', ...)
suggested_artifact_calls.purpose: Send the next checkpoint update across active surfaces.
